title: Bain el atlal
writer: Youssef El Sebai, Muhammad Uthman, Ezz El Dine Zulficar
actors: Faten Hamamah, Imad Hamdi, Salah Zulfikar
plot: This run-of-the-mill romantic comedy-drama is set in a university in Cairo and begins with a professor and a young student about to be married. Just at that point, their wedding is interrupted by the rest of the movie, which happe...
